name: Easy Tomato Cheese Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 can well-drained tomatoes, cut up and drained (16 oz.)
1 cup shredded sharp Cheddar cheese (4 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion and bacon until onions are translucent and bacon is crispy.
2. Drain the canned tomatoes (if necessary).
3. Spread the cooked onion mixture, diced bacon, drained tomatoes, and shredded cheese in a greased 9-inch pie plate.
4. In a bowl, beat the remaining ingredients with a beater or whisk until smooth.
5. Pour the batter over the filling in the pie plate.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-35 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
